title: The Manipur (Hill Areas) District Councils Act, 1971
full_text: The Manipur (Hill Areas) District Councils Act, 1971 मणिपुर (पहाङीक्षेत्र) जिलापरिषद्अधिनियम, 1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-76 Act Number: 76 Enactment Date: 1971-12-26 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The Manipur (Hill Areas) District Councils Act, 1971 Hindi Title: मणिपुर (पहाङीक्षेत्र) जिलापरिषद्अधिनियम, 1971 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of District Councils in the Hill Areas in the Union territory of Manipur. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 26-12-1971 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Manipur (Hill Areas) District Councils Act, 1971 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II CONSTITUTION OF DISTRICT COUNCILS CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF DISTRICT COUNCILS CHAPTER IV PROCEDURE AND STAFF OF DISTRICT COUNCILS CHAPTER V FINANCE OF DISTRICT COUNCILS AND VESTING OF PROPERTY CHAPTER VI CONTROL CHAPTER VII OFFENCES AND PENALTIES CHAPTER VIII RULES AND BYE-LAWS Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Division of Hill Areas into autonomous districts. Section 4. Constitution of District Councils and their composition. Section 5. Delimitation of constituencies. Section 6. Power to alter or amend delimitation orders. Section 7. Qualifications for membership. Section 8. Disqualifications for membership. Section 9. Electors on electoral rolls. Section 10. Right to vote. Section 11. Election of members. Section 12. Notification of results of elections. Section 13. Term of office of members. Section 14. Disputes as to elections. Section 15. Relief that may be claimed by petitioner. Section 16. Grounds on which an election may be called in question. Section 17. Procedure to be followed by the District Judge. Section 18. Decision of the District Judge. Section 19. Procedure in case of equality of votes. Section 20. Finality of decisions. Section 21. Power to make rules regulating the election of members. Section 22. Incorporation of District Councils. Section 23. Chairman and Vice-Chairman. Section 24. Oath or affirmation by members. Section 25. Vacation of seats. Section 26. Allowances of members. Section 27. Liability of members. Section 28. Members to be deemed to be public servants. Section 29. Functions of District Councils. Section 30. Conduct of business. Section 31. Committees. Section 32. Officers and staff. Section 33. Powers of taxation. Section 34. Levy of fees. Section 35. Procedure for imposing taxes. Section 36. Abolition or reduction of taxes. Section 37. Recovery of taxes and fees. Section 38. Assessment and collection of taxes and fees. Section 39. Appeals. Section 40. Instalments of taxes and fees. Section 41. Power to exempt from taxation. Section 42. Recoveries of moneys claimable by the Council. Section 43. Council Fund. Section 44. Property vested in District Council. Section 45. Budget. Section 46. Control. Section 47. Supersession of District Council. Section 48. Effect of certain provisions during the period when the Hill Areas Committee is not functioning. Section 49. Penalty for obstruction. Section 50. Penalty for entering into any contract with the Council. Section 51. Power of Administrator to make rules. Section 52. Power to make bye-laws. Section 53. Penalty for infringement of rules or bye-laws.
